title: solanum delagoense var. benguelense
intro: Solanum delagoense var. benguelense, also known as the "Benguela nightshade", is a plant species belonging to the Solanaceae family, which includes other edible plants like tomatoes and potatoes. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, particularly for its antiseptic and antibacterial qualities, which can be used to treat wounds and infections. The health benefits of Solanum delagoense var. benguelense include its ability to reduce inflammation and alleviate symptoms of fever, making it a valuable remedy for treating various health conditions. The plant can be prepared as a herbal tea, infusion, or poultice, and its leaves and roots can be used in traditional medicine to create various herbal preparations.
